message:
chore: add .cargo/config.toml.example for local dependency overrides

Provides a template for local Cargo path overrides that redirect git
dependencies (asupersync, rich_rust, frankentui, fastmcp_rust,
fastapi_rust) to sibling checkout paths for local iteration without
pushing. The actual config.toml is gitignored per convention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
